creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
* Upstream report:
  http://www.openoffice.org/security/cves/CVE-2014-3575.html

> Versions Affected:
> * Apache OpenOffice 4.1.0 and older on Windows.
> * OpenOffice.org versions are also affected.
> Apache OpenOffice users are advised to upgrade to Apache OpenOffice 4.1.1.
